title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Just listen to that crowd! The cheers of those
excited to see the birth of a champion echo
throughout the grounds!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Who will be this year's Derby Champion? The
Japanese Derby is starting soon!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
choice_data_list: Don't let it get to you.
Don't let it get to you.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...Right. This is just like any other race. I have to
focus.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I have only one goal, and one goal only—to catch
up to Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Big Brother. I'm off.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Big Sister. I'm off.
